prompt: HarbourLight Home Energy - a 30-second coastal home-energy advert for South African homeowners seeking clearer solar and battery planning.
audience: South African coastal homeowners managing power interruptions and energy costs.
callToAction: Book a home energy assessment at harbourlight.example.
legalQualifier: Savings and system performance vary by property, usage and installation conditions.
musicBrief: Original light acoustic and marimba-inspired instrumental bed with a calm opening and optimistic close. No vocals and no imitation of an existing work.

scenes.title: Morning Power
scenes.visualPrompt: A sunlit coastal South African home at breakfast as a family calmly notices a power interruption. Natural documentary realism, warm interiors, consistent household, text-free frame.
scenes.negativePrompt: No disaster imagery, generated text, logos, unsafe wiring or exaggerated reactions.
scenes.cameraDirection: Exterior dawn shot, kitchen medium shot, subtle close-up on switched-off appliance.
scenes.voiceoverText: Your home should feel ready for the day, even when the grid is not.
scenes.subtitleText: Your home should feel ready for the day, even when the grid is not.

scenes.title: Designed for Your Home
scenes.objective: Show a careful assessment and installation plan.
scenes.visualPrompt: The same homeowner walks with a qualified energy assessor around the property, reviewing roof orientation, household use and a tidy battery location. Credible equipment and safe professional behaviour, text-free frame.
scenes.negativePrompt: No unsafe roof work, generated labels, fake certification marks or character changes.
scenes.cameraDirection: Measured tracking shot, roofline cutaway, tablet planning close-up without readable UI.
scenes.voiceoverText: HarbourLight designs a solar and battery plan around your roof, your usage and your priorities.
scenes.subtitleText: HarbourLight designs a solar and battery plan around your roof, your usage and your priorities.

scenes.title: A Brighter Evening
scenes.objective: Show a calm outcome and assessment CTA.
scenes.visualPrompt: The same family enjoys a calm coastal evening in their well-lit home while a discreet solar and battery installation operates. Stable premium closing composition with negative space, text-free generated footage.
scenes.negativePrompt: No guaranteed savings, utility logos, generated text, fireworks or unrealistic power effects.
scenes.cameraDirection: Golden-hour exterior, warm interior family shot, stable closing frame.
scenes.voiceoverText: Make your next energy decision with a plan you understand. Book a HarbourLight home assessment today.
scenes.subtitleText: Make your next energy decision with a plan you understand. Book a HarbourLight home assessment today.

overlays.text: Savings and performance vary by property and usage.
